languages.text: "Ты требовал извинений. Он извинился. Этого мало?"
"You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"
languages.original_text: "Ты требовал извинений. Он извинился. Этого мало?"

traits.locale_text: "You demanded an apology. He has apologized. Is that not enough?"
"You demanded an apology. He has apologized. Is that not enough?"
"You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"
"You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"
"You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"
"You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"

languages.text: "Ihr habt eine Entschuldigung verlangt. Er hat sich entschuldigt. Reicht das nicht?"
languages.original_text: "You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt eine Entschuldigung verlangt. Er hat sich entschuldigt. Reicht das nicht?"

languages.text: « Vous avez exigé des excuses. Il s'est exécuté. Cela ne vous suffit donc pas ? »
languages.original_text: "You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez exigé des excuses. Il s'est exécuté. Cela ne vous suffit donc pas ? »

languages.text: «Has exigido una disculpa y te la ha dado. ¿Es que no te basta?».
languages.original_text: "You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"

traits.locale_text: «Has exigido una disculpa y te la ha dado. ¿Es que no te basta?».

languages.text: "Özür talep ettin. Özür diledi. Yetmez mi?"
languages.original_text: "You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"

traits.locale_text: "Özür talep ettin. Özür diledi. Yetmez mi?"

languages.text: “你要求道歉，他已经道了歉。这还不够吗？”
languages.original_text: "You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"

traits.locale_text: “你要求道歉，他已经道了歉。这还不够吗？”

languages.text: 「お前は謝罪を要求した。彼は謝罪した。それで十分ではないのか？」
languages.original_text: "You demanded an apology. He has apologised. Is that not enough?"

traits.locale_text: 「お前は謝罪を要求した。彼は謝罪した。それで十分ではないのか？」
